targets.rawSql:
SELECT ds.source_id, ds.priority, sh.status, sh.last_success_at, sh.freshness_lag_seconds, sh.consecutive_failures
FROM data_sources ds
LEFT JOIN source_health sh ON sh.source_id = ds.source_id
WHERE ds.enabled = true
ORDER BY ds.priority, sh.status, sh.freshness_lag_seconds DESC NULLS LAST;

SELECT
  ds.source_id,
  ds.priority,
  coalesce(count(DISTINCT rd.id), 0) AS raw_documents,
  coalesce(count(DISTINCT dc.id), 0) AS document_chunks,
  max(rd.fetched_at) AS latest_fetch_at
FROM data_sources ds
LEFT JOIN raw_documents rd ON rd.source_id = ds.source_id
LEFT JOIN document_chunks dc ON dc.raw_document_id = rd.id
WHERE ds.enabled = true
GROUP BY ds.source_id, ds.priority
ORDER BY ds.priority, raw_documents DESC, document_chunks DESC;

SELECT date_trunc('hour', fetched_at) AS time, count(*) AS raw_documents
FROM raw_documents
WHERE fetched_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;
